2606.20076.title: Variable-Length Tokenization via Learnable Global Merging for Diffusion Transformers
2606.20076.paper_summary: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) have become dominant in visual synthesis, but their quality-compute trade-off is largely constrained by the tokenizer's fixed compression ratio. Variable-length tokenizers (VLTs) promise adaptive compression by varying token counts, allowing diffusion models to flexibly balance quality and compute. However, conventional VLTs modulate length by truncating ordered token sequences, which makes token semantics depend on token position and breaks representational alignment across lengths. This leads to a cross-length shift in the latent distribution that hinders a single variable-length diffusion model from operating effectively. To address this, we propose a novel variable-length tokenizer that modulates length by merging tokens. We show that encouraging similar tokens to merge enables direct cross-length representation alignment when the diffusion transformer operates according to the merging pattern. Since conventional merging methods are data-dependent, making the merging pattern inaccessible during generation, we introduce learnable global merging, which is data-independent, to ensure compatibility with diffusion transformers. On ImageNet 256$\times$256 generation, our merging-based variable-length tokenizer integrated with a diffusion transformer achieves a superior gFID-compute trade-off compared to prior VLT methods. Code is available at [this https URL](https://github.com/movinghoon/lgm)
2606.20076.paper_summary_zh: 潛在擴散模型（LDMs）在視覺合成中已成為主流，但其質量與計算的權衡在很大程度上受到標記器固定壓縮比的限制。可變長度標記器（VLTs）通過變化標記數量來承諾自適應壓縮，使擴散模型能夠靈活平衡質量和計算。然而，傳統的 VLT 通過截斷有序標記序列來調節長度，這使得標記語義依賴於標記位置，並破壞了跨長度的表示對齊。這導致潛在分佈在不同長度之間的偏移，妨礙了單一可變長度擴散模型的有效運作。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種新穎的可變長度標記器，通過合併標記來調節長度。我們展示了鼓勵相似標記合併使得在擴散Transformer根據合併模式運作時，能夠實現直接的跨長度表示對齊。由於傳統的合併方法依賴於數據，這使得在生成過程中無法訪問合併模式，我們引入了可學習的全局合併，這是數據無關的，以確保與擴散Transformer的兼容性。在 ImageNet 256$\times$256 的生成中，我們基於合併的可變長度標記器與擴散Transformer的整合相比於先前的 VLT 方法實現了更優越的 gFID-計算權衡。代碼可在 [這個 https URL](https://github.com/movinghoon/lgm) 獲得。
2606.20076.author: Dong Hoon Lee et.al.
